name: peto
description: Personalized Effort and Tokenomics Optimization research scaffold.

scripts.check: node --check packages/cli/peto-cli.mjs && for file in packages/core/*.mjs; do node --check "$file"; done && node --check packages/gateway/router-gateway.mjs && node --check packages/mcp/peto-mcp-server.mjs && python3 -m py_compile packages/dispatcher/local-qwen-dispatcher.py
